dailyMarketOverview.title: Daily market overview
dailyMarketOverview.summary: Market breadth is constructive, led by financials, energy, AI infrastructure, and large-cap crypto. Momentum is positive but concentrated, so position sizing should remain disciplined.

marketSummaries.title: Energy sector is trending upward
marketSummaries.summary: Energy leadership improved as crude cooled and institutional flows returned to large-cap integrated energy names.

marketSummaries.title: AI infrastructure remains the strongest global theme
marketSummaries.summary: Semiconductor demand continues to support premium multiples for AI infrastructure leaders.

recommendations.reason: Data-center revenue momentum, strong news sentiment, and high trend score indicate durable leadership.
Improving bank-sector breadth and stable asset-quality signals support accumulation.
High-quality franchise, but near-term price momentum and discretionary IT demand remain muted.
Weak relative momentum and negative sentiment make risk-reward less attractive.

riskAlerts.message: Your portfolio has high tech exposure
riskAlerts.reason: Technology and AI-linked assets are leading returns but increase drawdown risk if momentum reverses.
BTC trend is positive, but derivative positioning can amplify short-term swings.

marketOpportunities.reason: Volume expansion and constructive news impact support follow-through.

marketOpportunities.message: Private banks show improving market leadership
marketOpportunities.reason: Financial Services is one of the strongest sector momentum clusters.

investmentSuggestions: Keep position sizes balanced while momentum is concentrated in technology and financials
Prefer assets with positive sentiment and trend scores above 70

portfolioSuggestions.action: Add exposure outside technology and crypto if portfolio concentration rises above 45%.
Use staggered entries and avoid chasing assets after large single-day moves.
